domain: Smart City / Urban Mobility Control Room
design_philosophy: A proactive AI-driven control room prioritizing real-time data visibility over decorative elements. Uses high-contrast typography, monospace data presentation, and a traffic-inspired color palette.

hierarchy.data_label: text-xs font-mono font-medium tracking-widest uppercase text-slate-400

surfaces.glass_panel: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] rounded-lg

components.button_primary: bg-amber-500 hover:bg-amber-600 text-black font-semibold rounded px-6 py-2 transition-all
components.button_outline: bg-transparent border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 text-white rounded px-6 py-2 transition-all
components.button_danger: bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/50 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500 hover:text-white rounded px-6 py-2 transition-all
components.input_field: bg-[#0A0A0C] border border-white/10 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 transition-all font-mono
components.badge_critical: bg-red-500/20 text-red-500 border border-red-500/30 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase
components.badge_warning: bg-amber-500/20 text-amber-500 border border-amber-500/30 px-2 py-1 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono uppercase

landing.narrative: Investigative dossier. Deep asphalt background. Overlapping large typography. Start with the problem: 'Bengaluru loses X hours to parking-induced congestion.' Use animated counters.
landing.methodology: Transparent breakdown of how the AI works. Use monospace fonts for algorithm names (DBSCAN, K-Means) and raw data snippets.

dashboard.layout: Full-bleed Leaflet map covering the entire viewport. Floating UI panels on top. Ensure map tiles are 'dark matter' or similar.
dashboard.executive_panel: Floating on the left. Contains total violations, active hotspots, capacity loss. Use 'metric_widget' surface.
dashboard.enforcement_queue: Floating on the right. List of high-priority actions (Tow, Patrol). Items should have critical/warning badges.
dashboard.prediction_center: A drawer or bottom panel showing time-series forecasting. Use Recharts with amber and red lines, no fills, and monospace axis ticks.

motion.hover: Subtle border color shifts and slight background lightening. No bouncy transforms.
motion.live_data: Pulse animation (opacity 0.5 to 1) for live markers on the map.
motion.loading: Use monospace ASCII-style loaders or simple indeterminate progress bars in amber.

images.description: Dark asphalt texture for landing page background overlays
Bengaluru night traffic to emphasize the problem
Modern control room aesthetic reference for the methodology section

iconography.instructions: Use standard lucide icons with consistent 1.5px or 2px stroke weight. Avoid solid/filled icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load IBM Plex Sans and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts.
Configure tailwind.config.js with the custom colors provided in the 'colors' section.
Build the dashboard as a true full-screen web app (h-screen, overflow-hidden) with the Leaflet map as the absolute positioned background z-0.
Use react-leaflet. The map tiles MUST be dark mode (e.g., CartoDB Dark Matter).
Float the UI panels over the map using absolute positioning and z-10, applying the 'glass_panel' surface classes.
All data points, metrics, and timestamps MUST use the 'data' typography (JetBrains Mono).
Charts (Recharts) must be styled to match the dark theme: transparent backgrounds, slate-400 monospace axis text, and amber/red stroke lines.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Do NOT use standard rounded SaaS cards for the dashboard. Stick to sharp edges or max 8px radius, using the provided surface guidelines.
The landing page is separate from the dashboard. Users land on the dossier page, then click 'Enter Control Room' to access the dashboard.
